entries.visual_note: Source and projection align exactly across the airborne silhouette, wings, staff, hands, and feet; overlay shows no doubled edges, mismatch marks, clipping, or added geometry.
Crouched landing pose is identically placed in both panels; hat, wing tips, robe folds, boots, and staff remain clean in the transparent overlay.
Standing recovery silhouette and all fine staff and wing edges coincide with no displacement, colored mismatch marks, clipping, or extra pixels.
Side-leaning action pose matches source geometry exactly; extended robe, fingers, wings, boots, and staff produce a single clean overlay contour.
Low braced pose is visually identical between source and projection, including the planted hand, wing extremities, robe hem, boots, and staff.
Kneeling pose, narrow ground details, staff, hat, face, and wings retain exact placement with no doubled edges or non-source geometry.
Seated silhouette aligns cleanly at both boots, trailing robe, outstretched hand, wing tips, and staff; no visual mismatch is present.
Rising crouch matches pixel-for-pixel visually, with clean hand, knee, boot, staff, hat, and wing contours and no clipping.
Wide dodge pose preserves the full extended arm, open hand, robe sweep, wings, boots, and separate staff without displacement or additions.
Front home pose is identically composed in both panels; vertical staff, hat tip, wings, robe hem, hands, and boots overlay without doubling.
Flight anticipation silhouette aligns exactly, including high wing tips, crouched body, both hands, boots, and angled staff.
Initial airborne pose shows exact source-to-projection placement across spread wings, hanging boots, robe edge, hands, and staff.
Level flight pose matches cleanly at the long wing edges, floating feet, robe sweep, hand, face, hat, and isolated staff.
Vertical hover pose retains the complete down-swept wings, boots, robe, staff, fingers, and hat with no clipping or overlay separation.
Upstroke flight pose is visually exact; both raised wing extremities, robe, feet, free hand, and staff remain single-contoured.
Front hover pose matches source geometry throughout the lowered wings, body, boots, hands, hat, and parallel staff.
Banked hover silhouette and asymmetrical wings align exactly, with no doubled border around the hat, robe, boots, hands, or staff.
Dynamic banked flight pose preserves both widely separated wings, tilted body, boots, hands, hat, and staff without mismatch marks.
Opposite bank pose overlays exactly at all wing steps, robe contours, feet, face, hand, and diagonal staff.
Airborne turn pose matches cleanly across the broad wing, small rear wing, robe, boots, open hand, face, and staff.
Rear flight view is identically placed, including hair and hat silhouette, layered wings, trailing robe, boots, hand, and staff.
Climbing flight pose has exact alignment at raised staff tip, spread wings, angled body, hand, robe, and boots with no clipping.
Descending flight silhouette matches source placement at the tilted face, wing tips, sleeves, robe, boots, and long staff.
Horizontal prone-flight pose aligns precisely, including low body profile, outstretched wings, boots, hands, and horizontal staff.
Front flight settle pose preserves symmetric wings, floating boots, robe hem, hands, hat, and separate staff with no overlay divergence.
Front hover pose matches exactly across the full wing span, upright body, boots, fist, hat, hand grip, and vertical staff.
Open-hand hover pose is visually identical, with clean fingers, sleeves, robe, boots, wings, hat, and staff boundaries.
Banked flight pose retains exact geometry in the tucked hand, robe sweep, boots, wings, face, hat, and diagonal staff.
Wide-gesture flight silhouette aligns cleanly at the separated fingers, wing tips, robe, feet, gripping hand, and angled staff.
Forward-reaching flight pose matches exactly around the extended fingers, hat tip, wings, robe, boots, and staff grip.
Turning airborne pose preserves the tilted head, offset wings, extended hand, robe, boots, and staff with no doubled or missing edges.
Fast horizontal flight pose is a clean visual match across the large wing span, foreshortened body, staff held across the torso, robe, and boots.
